india.title: 🇮🇳 India Daily
india.lede: India macro, equities, rupee, trade, inflation, policy, and daily economy signals.

indonesia.title: 🇮🇩 Indonesia Daily
indonesia.lede: Indonesia macro, markets, rupiah, policy, and daily economy signals.

ram-market.title: 💾 RAM Market
ram-market.lede: DRAM, DDR5, HBM, supply, demand, and AI-memory market signals.

ai-tech.title: 🧠 AI Tech News
ai-tech.lede: AI product launches, model updates, agent platforms, developer tooling, and policy moves.
schedule: Runs twice weekly: **Monday** and **Friday** at 10:00 AM PT.

germany.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Economy
germany.lede: Germany growth, inflation, trade, labor, industry, and macro outlook.

france.title: 🇫🇷 France Economy
france.lede: France growth, inflation, industry, labor, consumption, confidence, and macro outlook.

ukraine-war.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine War Sentiment
ukraine-war.lede: Daily public-web read on the Russia–Ukraine war: battlefield signals, online narratives, and who appears to be winning the day.

policy-stock.title: 🏛️ Policy → Stock
policy-stock.lede: Monthly public-law and executive-order mapping to sector and public-equity exposure.
schedule: Runs near month-end and only produces a full briefing on the final calendar day of the month.
Coverage: US public laws, executive orders, significant rules, affected sectors/tickers, lobbying-spend signals, and thesis-level stock mapping.
